title: Beyond IID Data: A Proxy-Based Computational Study of Quantum Oracle Sketching Robustness under Structured Non-IID Streaming
description: Reference Python implementation and reproducibility package for a proxy-based computational sensitivity study of quantum oracle sketching under structured non-IID data streams. Includes five synthetic stream generators (IID, Markov, seasonal, burst, long-memory), three classical memory-bounded baselines (online SGD, averaged SGD, Count-Min hash classifier), heuristic quantum accuracy proxies derived from an effective-sample model, a real-stream sanity-check pipeline applied to two NAB datasets (NYC Taxi and Machine Temperature), and a proxy-sensitivity ablation suite. The (tau, r) sensitivity landscape is the central diagnostic artefact.
